description: If you want to make a style statement effortlessly, this Pink shoulder bag from murcia will come in handy. The bag is large enough to accommodate all your essentials, plus it's so attractive that you will get appreciative glances all day long. The versatile bag looks as great with casual outfits as it does with your formal wear. Time to take the office by storm, and be the coolest chick at the mall too! Made of leather for enhanced durability and styleTwo roomy zippered compartments with inner zippered pocket to hold essentialsSmall zippered compartment at the front and back for stowing essentialsContrast thread detailing for added attractionAdjustable belt on the sidesTwo padded short handles for ease of carrying and extra comfortMetal loops for the handles with stud detailing for added styleGenuine leather badge on the frontBranded zippers and sliders for easy use Bag careRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a mild leather cleaner
